name: Tuff Luck
description: Tuff Luck is a (caracal) feline who is one of the Life Trap Masters in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: For many years, Tuff Luck and her tribe guarded the Fortunata Springs – the source of all good luck in Skylands. Though hidden in the Random Canyons, which move without warning to cover the hidden entrance to the magical waters, minions of Kaos located the springs and flew in sponge-tankers to drain every drop of the lucky liquid. Fortunately, Tuff Luck was patrolling the area and immediately jumped into action when she saw what was happening. Between her awesome skill and unbeatable good luck, she single-handedly drove off the minions. She then drank from the magical waters, as was custom for her tribe. Sensing a greater calling, Tuff Luck decided to leave her tribe to join the Trap Team, where she could do even more to help protect Skylands. Armed with her Traptanium Warblades, she always beats the odds – and evil – at every turn!
personality: Tuff Luck has a lot of good stuff going for her. She is all about taking chances. Like the rest of her tribe, she is also very protective of the Fortunata Springs.

story.content: Tuff Luck was one of the Trap Masters sought by Gearshift to help tackle Pain-Yatta's army of candy warriors. When they managed to save a group of Mabu from the enemy, she along with the other Skylanders were forced to retreat into an old fortress, holding out until help arrives. As they were cornered by the candy army within the fortress, Tuff Luck and the other Skylanders served as Skylands' last line of defense, battling Pain-Yatta's army with all of their might. The candy army soon fell to pieces just as the Skylanders were becoming overwhelmed (thanks to the actions of the Light and Dark Skylanders in their fight against Pain-Yatta), earning the heroes their victory.

trivia: Her original catchphrase was 'It's Your Lucky Day!' although it was changed to 'Deal With It!' late in development.
In Skylanders Collection Vault, her catchphrase is still listed as 'It's Your Lucky Day!' even though it has been changed.
She is the third Life Skylander who can turn invisible, after Stealth Elf and Stink Bomb.
She appears in the Robot Chicken episode 'Fridge Smell'.
Tuff Luck is the second female Life Skylander, while Stealth Elf is the first.
Tuff Luck speaks with an Irish accent, likely inspired by the Leprechaun of Irish folklore.
She shares the attack name 'Green Thumb' with Food Fight and a character card for Broccoli Guy.
Her appearance is similar to Cali's, as Tuff Luck's feline species is a caracal.
Tuff Luck jumps farther than the rest of the Skylanders, which gives her a slight advantage but sometimes she may miss some platforms.
Like Stealth Elf, Tuff Luck is only ever shown at her full height during her idle animation.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Tuff Luck's Soul Gem Preview (Deal With It)

gameplay: Tuff Luck can attack her enemies with her Traptanium Warblades, and even unleash waves of energy from them. She can also turn invisible in clusters of four-leaf clovers to pounce on her opponents. Upon purchasing her Soul Gem ability, she can create spiky blades of grass that attack all enemies around her. One of Tuff Luck's notable gameplay traits is her major luck factor. When using the Warblade Stab attack, either alone or in tangent, to another ability, there is a chance that it will be charged with the energy of a rainbow, increasing the area of effect and dealing significantly more damage to enemies.

basic.name: Traptanium Warblades
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swipe with Traptanium Warblades. Press Attack 1, Attack 1, Attack 1 for a combo strike.

basic.name: Pounce Mode
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to enter Pounce Mode, invisible to enemies. Then press Attack 1 to pounce!.

basic_upgrades.name: Warblade Stab
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to spring forward with a powerful Warblade Stab attack.

basic_upgrades.name: Control Your Destiny
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to control where Warblade Stab lands.

basic_upgrades.name: Glave Wave
basic_upgrades.content: Traptanium Warblade attack now shoots an energy wave.

soulgems.name: Garden of Pain
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 3 and press Attack 1 to grow spiky blades of grass that do massive damage.

abilities.name: Poison Ivy
abilities.content: Clover patches in Pounce Mode stun enemies.

abilities.name: Powerful Pounce
abilities.content: Traptanium Warblade attack from Pounce Mode does more damage

abilities.name: 4-Leafed Clover
abilities.content: Touching clover in Pounce Mode restores HP.

abilities.name: Wave Goodbye
abilities.content: Energy wave released from Traptanium Warblade attack does more damage.

abilities.name: Lucky Spin
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1 Hold Attack 2 for Lucky Spin combo.

abilities.name: Wiggin' Warblade
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1, Hold Attack 3 for Wiggin' Warblade combo.
